name: Zippy Blue Cheese Spread (Eb)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the crumbled blue cheese and creamed cottage cheese in a bowl.
2. Add the melted butter or margarine to the mixture.
3. Stir in the chopped basil, oregano leaves, chili powder, and ground white pepper until well blended.
4. Transfer the spread to an airtight container and store it in the refrigerator.
